title: ilex fasciculata
intro: Ilex fasciculata, also known as the holly-leafed mountain holly, is a type of evergreen shrub native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves, which are rich in antioxidants and contain compounds that have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ilex fasciculata include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and supporting cardiovascular health, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Ilex fasciculata can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and its leaves can also be dried and used in herbal capsules or powders.
